name: Model Theory — Elementary Equivalence
description: M ≡ N: same first-order theory. Elementary embedding: preserves all formulas. Quantifier elimination: every formula equivalent to quantifier-free.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Th M\ntheory of M"]
    D2["Def: M ≡ N\nsame FO theory"]
    D3["Def: Elementary embedding\npreserves all formulas"]
    D4["Def: QE\nquantifier elimination"]
    T1["Thm: M ≺ N ⇒ M ≡ N"]
    T2["Thm: Back-and-forth\nfor countable"]
    D1 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> T1
    D2 --> T2
    D4 --> T2
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2 theorem
